mapper.select: SELECT * FROM experience_share_audit WHERE share_id=#{shareId} AND is_deleted=0 ORDER BY audit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experience_share_audit WHERE DATE(audit_time) = CURDATE() AND audit_by = #{auditBy} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experience_share_audit WHERE YEARWEEK(audit_time,1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(),1) AND audit_by = #{auditBy} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experience_share_audit WHERE DATE_FORMAT(audit_time,'%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m') AND audit_by = #{auditBy} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM experience_share_audit WHERE audit_by = #{auditBy} AND is_deleted=0 ORDER BY audit_time DESC LIMIT 3
